modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Blue screen error when starting a quiz on Examplify.

full_description_text: The user is experiencing a blue screen that causes an automatic restart every time they try to start a quiz on Examplify. This issue happens consistently, making it impossible for them to complete their exam. They mentioned that this problem occurs right at the beginning of the quiz.
short_description: Blue screen error when starting a quiz on Examplify.
description: The user is experiencing a blue screen that causes an automatic restart every time they try to start a quiz on Examplify. This issue happens consistently, making it impossible for them to complete their exam. They mentioned that this problem occurs right at the beginning of the quiz.
